subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — and thanks for following up after the conference!

I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar. Here are some slots that work well on our side:

- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Any of those work for a 30-minute call? Just let me know your preference and I'll send over a calendar invite.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal personnel contact information or phone numbers. If you'd like to connect with senior stakeholders, I'd suggest reaching out through our public website, which has the appropriate contact channels for partnership and business inquiries.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
